title: Great white spotted at Central Beach
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A great white shark...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A great white shark was spotted at Central Beach in Plettenberg Bay today, Thursday 23 October, at about 14:30.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A great white shark was spotted at Central Beach in Plettenberg Bay today, Thursday 23 October, at about 14:30."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Melissa Nel, head of Plett Sharkspotters, said that the sighting was made from a Sharkspotters vantage point on the top of the Beacon Isle Hotel."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She said no one was in the water at the time and the beach was closed. She said it will be reopened at about 17:00.","html":"She said no one was in the water at the time and the beach was closed. She said it will be reopened at about 17:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nel said a number of bronze whaler sharks had also been spotted in the bay in the past two or three days.","html":"Nel said a number of bronze whaler sharks had also been spotted in the bay in the past two or three days."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The sharks are around, “ said Nel. She urged bathers to be vigilant.","html":"“The sharks are around, “ said Nel. She urged bathers to be vigilant."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Great white spotted at Central Beach
